title: Change milestone input to use plus sign button like tasks

requirements.text: Replace the one-per-line milestone input fields with a plus sign button interaction pattern that matches how tasks are added: display a text input field with a '+' or 'Add' button that appends a new milestone to the list on click, instead of rendering one input row per milestone by default.

quotes: I want the milestones to be add by plus sign like task not one per line

acceptanceCriteria: Milestones section shows a single text input with a plus/add button, not pre-rendered rows for each milestone.
Clicking the plus button (or pressing Enter) appends the typed milestone to the list and clears the input field.
Existing saved milestones are displayed as a list with individual delete/remove controls.
The milestone add interaction is visually consistent with the task add pattern used elsewhere in the planner.

constraints: Do not change the backend data model or API for milestones.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Modifying any other planner sections beyond the milestones input UI.
